objective: maximize the validation score of the ranking model
transcript:
=== SESSION LOG — agent a9 — objective: maximize the validation score of the ranking model ===
(iterative optimize-eval loop; evals scored by the shared grader; session 16)

--- attempt 1 (commit dc4412e) ---
thought: The diff was small but the eval moved more than expected; need to confirm it's real.
$ python train.py --config sweep.yaml --eval-on-finish
  worker[4] heartbeat ok, queue depth 6
  validator: 16 constraints checked, 0 violations
  worker[9] heartbeat ok, queue depth 37
[eval] attempt 1: score=0.5345 (best so far 0.5345)
observation: Behavior matches the docs. Moving on.

observation: Small improvement, within noise. Keeping the change since it simplifies the code.

observation: Tried stale-gradient averaging this attempt — abandoning it: it oscillated near the boundary and never converged.

--- attempt 5 (commit 8fa17bb) ---

[eval] attempt 5: score=0.6144 (best so far 0.6144)
observation: Confirmed drop_phase=0.73 is load-bearing: nudging it in either direction tanked the score, so it must stay at 0.73.
observation: Eval ran clean. The improvement is reproducible across two runs.
